chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1575 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 6218/2025 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 6219/2025 4. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mohiuddin Panhwar, Advocate for Petitioner. 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner states that the Petitioner has moved applications dated 15.12.2023 and 13.02.2025 (Court file Pgs-19 & 23) to the Additional Deputy commissioner-I Badin, but no orders have been passed thereon as yet. Counsel after arguing at length submits that the Petitioner will be satisfied if the said applications submitted to the Additional Deputy Commissioner-I Badin are ordered to be decided at the earliest. In view of above, this Petition is disposed of, with direction to the Additional Deputy Commissioner-I Badin (Respondent No.3) to decide the Petitioner’s Applications pending before him by giving patient hearing to the Petitioner and pass an speaking Order in accordance with law within two months JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
